item.title: Notiqflow 0.2.0
item.description:
Notiqflow 0.2.0

  • A fresh Brylabs look. The whole app has been redesigned around the Brylabs plum and gold palette.
  • Faster, more accurate dictation. Parakeet v3 is now the default speech engine — quicker and more accurate for everyday dictation. Whisper is still selectable if you prefer it.
  • Smarter AI cleanup. Text tidy-up now runs on Qwen3 for clearer, better-punctuated results.
  • Automatic updates. From this version onward, Notiqflow checks for updates and installs them in the background, so you are always on the latest release.
